name: approval-system
description: 行政审批事项办理系统

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:client
scripts.ci: npm ci && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run seed && npm run start
